BATTERY RECYCLING · R&D · PLANT & PROCESS ENGINEERING
From Lab ➔ Industry,
Engineering the circular battery value chain.

Materials Science graduate from TU Darmstadt and Aalto University with expertise spanning hydrometallurgical battery recycling, advanced battery materials, and large-scale manufacturing engineering.

Combining applied research at Fraunhofer IWKS with three years of process engineering and plant commissioning experience at Hyundai Motor India. Specialized in critical metal recovery from lithium-ion battery black mass, process optimization, and sustainable battery technologies.

Seeking Materials R&D, Battery Recycling and Industrialization roles that bridge scientific innovation with manufacturing execution.

FOCUS AREAS
Where I create value

Click a card for the detail. This is the work I want more of — not a generic skills list.

Battery Recycling
Leaching, precipitation & solvent extraction for spent LIB black mass.
+

At Fraunhofer IWKS, I worked on hydrometallurgical refining LIB black mass to selectively remove Fe and Al impurities to recover battery grade critical metals. Process feasible with both standalone (NMC) and mixed-chemistry (NMC + LFP) feedstocks. Designed and ran leaching/purification trials, characterised outputs with ICP-OES, SEM-EDS, XRD and TGA.

Battery Materials R&D
Bio-based hard carbon anodes for sodium-ion batteries.
+

At Aalto University, I synthesised and characterised bio-based hard carbon anode materials for Na-ion batteries — a lower-cost, more sustainable alternative to graphite anodes. Hands on experience in glove-box operation, electrode preparation, electrolyte formulation, coin cell assembly and electrochemical testing. Gives me a working view of both ends of the battery value chain: material design and end-of-life recovery.

Process Engineering
Cross-plant project delivery & process optimization.
+

2 years at Hyundai Motor India managing cross-functional projects across three manufacturing plants — process engineering, equipment overhaul, new equipment procurement and commissioning and plant operations (utilities and safety). €25K+ in annual savings delivered through structured process optimization.

Plant Commissioning & Erection
Factory layout redesign for energy transition goals
+

Led a full conversion of a legacy engine plant into an EV assembly line. Independently conducted value stream analysis and ROI securing business case approval for project execution. Extensive process mapping through utilities and equipment installation, commissioning and SOP directly supporting Hyundai's energy-transition roadmap.
